*** 3 INJ *** CONFIRMED EF1 TORNADO ROLLED A MOBILE HOME ONTO ITS TOP ON THE EASTSIDE OF BETHEL LANE. SEVERAL 6-8 INCH TREES WERE ALSO SNAPPED.
A CONFIRMED EF1 TORNADO REMOVED THE ENTIRE ROOF FROM A METAL BARN ON ASHCRAFT ROAD. ALSO A DOCK WAS PULLED FROM ITS ANCHOR.

A CONFIRMED EF1 TORNADO CAUSED DAMAGE AT THE INTERSECTION OF ROUTE 609 AND DAVIS ROAD. ONE BARN WEST OF ROUTE 609 WAS DESTROYED AND A TREE APPROXIMATELY 20 INCHES IN DIAMETER IMMEDIATELY EAST OF THE ROAD WAS SNAPPED AT THE TRUNK AND FELL AGAINST A RESIDENCE. ANOTHER BARN JUST TO THE NORTH WAS PARTIALLY DESTROYED.

CONFIRMED EF1 TORNADO SNAPPED NUMEROUS TREES ALONG DAVIS ROAD. THE ROOF WAS PARTIALLY REMOVED FROM A RESIDENCE AT THE INTERSECTION OF ROUTE 159 AND DAVIS ROAD. SECTIONS OF METAL FENCING FROM A HORSE CORRAL WERE LIFTED AND CARRIED APPROXIMATELY 50 YARDS.
BARN BLOWN OVER NEAR LANES END RD. WITH NUMEROUS TREES DOWN THROUGHOUT COUNTY. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR.

CONFIRMED EF1 TORNADO LIFTED AND DESTROYED A CAMPER AT THE INTERSECTION OF HICKORY GROVE ROAD AND ROUTE 10. THERE WAS ALSO MINOR STRUCTURAL DAMAGE AT TWO NEARBY MOBILE HOMES. THIS DAMAGE CONSISTED OF GARAGE DOORS BLOWN INWARD AND SOME ROOF DAMAGE.
